reason: Added persistent nextTabNumber handling and label derivation logic so newly opened tabs never reuse closed tab labels.
notes: Updated default state, restore path, add-tab path, and close-tab path.

reason: Added right-click copy and controlled paste handlers, clipboard helper functions, and disabled xterm right-click word selection to fix terminal UX issues.
notes: Context menu is suppressed in terminal; paste now clears selection and uses plain text clipboard data.

reason: Reviewed existing terminal lifecycle and input wiring to ensure event-handler changes stayed scoped to presentation/input responsibility.
notes: No runtime/session API changes required.

reason: Changed the table card overflow behavior to preserve rounded border clipping on the routes page.
notes: Set overflow to hidden on the card wrapper.

reason: Moved the dropdown menu into a portal and added viewport-based positioning so the menu renders above clipped containers.
notes: Also updated outside-click handling to include the portaled menu.

reason: Corrected the relative import so Next.js can resolve backendProxy during production build of the app route.
notes: Changed '../../../../server/backendProxy' to '../../../server/backendProxy'.

reason: Confirmed the target module path and existing proxy helper used by the new events route.
notes: No code changes were needed here.

reason: Implements the backend in-memory publish/subscribe hub that stores and broadcasts route and user change events to connected clients.
notes: New realtime transport primitive for SSE.

reason: Covers the realtime hub broadcast and unsubscribe behavior so the push mechanism is safe to use in the backend.
notes: Unit tests for publish/subscribe semantics.

reason: Adds the /api/events SSE endpoint and publishes route/user change events after successful mutations.
notes: Main API orchestration now emits realtime notifications.

reason: Constructs and injects the realtime hub into the API handler at startup.
notes: Wires the new transport into the backend entrypoint.

reason: Preserves streaming response headers like x-accel-buffering for the EventSource proxy path.
notes: Needed so the frontend proxy can relay SSE correctly.

reason: Forwards the browser-facing /api/events endpoint to the backend SSE stream while keeping auth cookies on the same origin.
notes: New proxy route for realtime subscriptions.

reason: Provides a reusable client-side EventSource subscription hook that refetches on matching realtime events.
notes: Shared hook used by routes and users workspaces.

reason: Subscribes the routes workspace to route change events so the list silently refetches when another client creates or edits routes.
notes: This file is still flagged by Biome formatting in targeted lint.

reason: Subscribes the admin users workspace to user change events so the admin list silently refetches when another client creates or edits users.
notes: Realtime refresh for admin account changes.

reason: Added lastActiveAt persistence, compatibility fallback serialization, and the TouchLastActive storage method used by authenticated access.
notes: Also kept lastLoginAt as a deprecated alias in the public JSON contract.

reason: Refreshed the active timestamp on successful login, password-based session renewal, and every authenticated request that passes requireUser.
notes: The handler now writes back the current active time into the in-memory user before returning auth responses.

reason: Renamed the managed user timestamp contract to lastActiveAt so the admin UI matches the new backend field.
notes: The frontend type no longer depends on lastLoginAt.

reason: Updated the admin users table and mobile cards to label and render Last active using the new timestamp field.
notes: Kept the existing visual layout and added a neutral empty-state message for users with no activity yet.
